name: DeepSeek R1 Distill 1.5B
description: DeepSeek R1 chain-of-thought reasoning model distilled into a compact 1.5B parameter size. Optimized for logical inference and step-by-step problem solving.

name: Phi 3.5 Mini Instruct
description: Microsoft's 3.8B parameter model with an extraordinary 128K token context window. Ideal for long-document analysis and extended conversations.

name: Qwen 2.5 7B Instruct
description: Alibaba Cloud's flagship 7B model in 4-bit AWQ quantization. Highest quality output among the three with 32K token context and rich instruction-following capability.
